title: anthoxanthum repens
intro: Anthoxanthum repens, also known as quaking grass or sweet grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Anthoxanthum repens is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies and can be found in some traditional medicine practices.
